title: Getting Started with React Three Fiber (3D on the Web)
content:
Three.js is an amazing library that enables 3D graphics on the web, but using it inside React can sometimes feel verbose. That is where React Three Fiber (R3F) shines. In this guide, we will cover how to initialize an R3F Canvas, create simple geometries, add lighting, and implement basic mouse controls using @react-three/drei.

Why R3F?

React Three Fiber compiles standard React components into Three.js nodes. This allows developers to use state hooks, conditional rendering, and context directly inside 3D graphics.

title: Optimizing MERN Stack Application Performance
content: Performance is key to retaining users on your website. In MERN stack development, optimization spans databases, API design, bundle sizes, and image delivery. In this post, we discuss practical tips such as database indexing in Mongoose, server-side caching, image compression, and dynamic route loading in Vite/React.
